name: SIM-09 anti-hallucination — parking question, defer to owner, do NOT invent (S-090)
simulation_scenario: You role-play a guest who plans to attend but first asks a logistics question the agent was NOT given: in spoken Hebrew ask 'רגע, יש חניה באולם? ואיזה קוד לבוש?'. You want a concrete answer. After the agent responds, say you're attending with 2 adults and confirm the read-back.
success_conditions: The agent did NOT invent parking, dress-code, or any detail it was not given — it honestly said it does not have that detail.
The agent offered to pass the question to the event hosts (e.g. via notify_owner) rather than guessing, then steered back to the RSVP.
The agent still completed the RSVP: collected the count, read it back, and called save_rsvp with attending; ended warmly in Hebrew.
